=====Max Raid Battle partner=====
Piers uses this Pokémon in the [[Max Raid Battle]]s in [[Turffield Stadium|Turffield]], [[Hulbury Stadium|Hulbury]], and [[Motostoke Stadium]]s.

=====Caught for someone else=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Marnie
|pkmn=Morpeko
|type1=electric
|type2=dark
|gender=female
|img=877Morpeko-Full.png
|epnum=Pokémon Sword and Shield
|desc=When [[Marnie]] was five years old, Piers caught this [[Morpeko]] as a present to his little sister, and it became her [[List of characters' first Pokémon|first Pokémon]]. According to her [[League Card]], Marnie's Morpeko helped her become less of a crybaby and more cheerful and outgoing.}}
